sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n60306" key="kta/" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κτά</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κταίνω</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κτάμεν</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κρώγ-εναι</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κτάμενος</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κτάνε</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κτάνθεν</orth>, <sense id="n60306.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">κτείνω</ref></xr>.</sense> </entryFree>
